images.alt:
Cellophane tape is a type of transparent adhesive tape that is used for a variety of purposes, including sealing envelopes and packages, wrapping gifts, and temporarily holding things together. It is made from a thin, clear film of cellulose, a type of biodegradable polymer derived from wood pulp.
Cellophane tape is often referred to as
"Scotch tape," which is actually a brand name that has become synonymous with clear adhesive tape in many parts of the world. The tape is coated on one side with a pressure-sensitive adhesive that allows it to stick to a wide variety of surfaces, including paper, cardboard, and plastic.
Cellophane tape is available in a range of widths and lengths to suit different applications, and can be easily torn by hand or cut with scissors. It is a versatile and inexpensive tool that is commonly found in homes, offices, and schools around the world.

Geek Pride Day

images.alt:
Geek Pride Day is celebrated on May 25th to honor geek culture and embrace the positive aspects of being a geek. The holiday was first established in Spain in 2006 and has since spread to other countries around the world.
On Geek Pride Day, people celebrate by indulging in their geeky hobbies and interests, such as reading comics, playing video games, watching sci-fi movies, and participating in cosplay. The holiday also encourages people to embrace their individuality and take pride in their unique passions and talents.
Geek Pride Day is often associated with science fiction and fantasy culture, as well as technology and gaming. It is a day for geeks of all stripes to come together and celebrate their shared interests and enthusiasms, and to recognize the valuable contributions that geeks have made to society in fields such as science, technology, and entertainment.

images.alt:
Google:  Do not weary of drinking, eating, getting intoxicated and making love! Make holiday! 

Al Overview

Cheers to that! It's an excellent philosophy, and if you are looking to put it into action

right here in Le Plateau-Mont-Royal, you have some of the best food, drinks, and

nightlife in the city right outside your door.

Here is a quick guide to making the most of your holiday in the neighborhood:

+ Epicurean Feasting: For stellar BYOB dining, grab a table at L'Avenue on Mont-
Royal for an unforgettable brunch, or head to Schwartz's Deli (just a short walk
south) for Montreal's legendary smoked meat.

+ Drink & Get Intoxicated: The Plateau is famous for its vibrant bar scene. Sip world-
class cocktails at L'Gros Luxe, grab a local Quebec craft pint at Vices & Versa on
Saint-Laurent, or enjoy a cozy, intimate vibe at Le Lab.

+ Make Holiday: Take a romantic or leisurely stroll up to the lookout at Mount Royal
Park to watch the sunset, then wander the shaded paths of La Fontaine Park.

Always pace yourself, and enjoy the holiday!

AI doesn't know it's wrong. It won't guess your vibe either.

The myth: AI always tries to be helpful, even when it's wrong.

The truth: AI doesn't try anything. It predicts text based on patterns. No intention, no conscience, no awareness. When it's wrong, it doesn't know it. It just sounds confident while making things up, especially when your request is vague or missing context. (1/3)
